pi_items.source: Odoo official hr_demo.xml confirms 'Consultant' is a defined employee category (tag) with color code 4. Also verified in setup_task.sh which creates/ensures this tag exists.
Task description explicitly states '2 days' of Paid Time Off. Verifier confirms expecting 2.0 days. Export script extracts 'number_of_days' field.

Odoo official hr_holidays_demo.xml defines 'Paid Time Off' as a standard leave type (referenced as 'holiday_status_cl'). Setup task ensures this leave type exists. Task description explicitly mentions 'Paid Time Off'.

Task description says 'By Employee Tag' mode. Odoo hr.leave.allocation model's 'holiday_type' field uses 'category' value for employee tag-based allocations. Export script maps this field to 'mode' in results. Verifier checks for mode == 'category'.

Task description requires allocation be 'Approved (Validated)'. Odoo allocation states include 'validate' for approved allocations. Verifier checks for state in ['validate', 'validate1'] as valid approved states.

privileged_info_summary: All metadata claims are verified against official Odoo 17 HR module demo data and task specifications. The 'Consultant' tag and 'Paid Time Off' leave type are both defined in Odoo's bundled demo data. The task requires a bulk allocation of 2.0 days using the 'category' (By Employee Tag) mode in validated state. The allocation description should be 'Project Bonus'. Marc Demo employee is tagged as Consultant to ensure the allocation affects at least one employee.
